revision.comment: Bot: single‑shot reformat + ill→|12=draft + draft categories + iws + DEFAULTSORT + move HTML comments + meta‑cat check
revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1582]] {{ill|May 28|ja|5月28日|12=draft}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=draft}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 3|ja|6月3日|12=draft}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1703]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|Sonezaki Shinchū|ja|曽根崎心中|12=draft}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|ja|桜木町駅|12=draft}}).
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|12=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|12=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|12=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|12=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|12=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|12=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|12=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|12=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|12=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|12=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[zh-yue:" to "[[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-yue:"
revision.text:
[[Category:pages to sort]][[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-yue:五月初七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1582]] {{ill|May 28|ja|5月28日|12=draft}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=draft}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 3|ja|6月3日|12=draft}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1703]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|Sonezaki Shinchū|ja|曽根崎心中|12=draft}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|ja|桜木町駅|12=draft}}).
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|12=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|12=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|12=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|12=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|12=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|12=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|12=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|12=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|12=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|12=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
[[Category:pages to sort]][[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-yue:五月初七]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-yue:五月初七]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-yue:五月初七]]

== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1582]] {{ill|May 28|ja|5月28日|12=draft}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=draft}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 3|ja|6月3日|12=draft}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1703]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|Sonezaki Shinchū|ja|曽根崎心中|12=draft}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|ja|桜木町駅|12=draft}}).
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|12=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|12=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|12=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|12=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|12=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|12=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|12=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|12=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|12=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|12=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}

[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:May 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:May 7 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:May 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:May 7 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:May 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:May 7 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1582]] {{ill|May 28|ja|5月28日|12=draft}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=draft}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 3|ja|6月3日|12=draft}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1703]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|Sonezaki Shinchū|ja|曽根崎心中|12=draft}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|ja|桜木町駅|12=draft}}).
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|12=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|12=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|12=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|12=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|12=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|12=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|12=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|12=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|12=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|12=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1582]] {{ill|May 28|ja|5月28日|12=draft}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=draft}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 3|ja|6月3日|12=draft}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1703]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|Sonezaki Shinchū|ja|曽根崎心中|12=draft}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|ja|桜木町駅|12=draft}}).
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|12=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|12=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|12=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|12=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|12=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|12=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|12=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|12=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|12=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|12=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}

[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:May 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:May 7 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:May 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:May 7 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:May 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:May 7 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1582]] {{ill|May 28|ja|5月28日|12=draft}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=draft}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 3|ja|6月3日|12=draft}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1703]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|Sonezaki Shinchū|ja|曽根崎心中|12=draft}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|ja|桜木町駅|12=draft}}).
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|12=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|12=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|12=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|12=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|12=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|12=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|12=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|12=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|12=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|12=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月7日'''（きゅうれきごがつなのか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1333年]][[6月19日]]） - 倒幕に転じた[[足利尊氏]]の攻撃により京都・[[六波羅探題]]が陥落 * [[天正]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1582年]][[5月28日]]） - [[毛利氏]]征討の[[豊臣秀吉]]が[[高松城 (備中国)|備中高松城]]を包囲し水攻め * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1615年]][[6月3日]]） - [[大坂の陣#大坂夏の陣|大坂夏の陣]]で[[大坂城]][[天守]]が炎上 * [[元禄]]16年（グレゴリオ暦[[1703年]][[6月20日]]） - 大坂・竹本座で[[近松門左衛門]]作の[[人形浄瑠璃]]『[[曽根崎心中]]』が初演 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[6月12日]]） - [[品川駅]]～横浜駅（現:[[桜木町駅]]）間で日本初の[[鉄道]]が仮営業を開始
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]9年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1402年]][[6月7日]]） - [[一条兼良]]、[[歌人]]（+ [[1481年]]） * [[慶長]]16年（グレゴリオ暦[[1611年]][[6月30日]]） - [[保科正之]]、[[徳川秀忠]]四男、[[会津藩]]主（+ [[1673年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[6月21日]]） - [[本居宣長]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1801年]]） * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[5月29日]]） - [[伊東巳代治]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1934年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[260年]] - [[曹髦]]、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の4代[[皇帝]]（* [[241年]]） <!--* [[慶雲]]2年（ユリウス暦[[705年]][[6月2日]]） - [[忍壁皇子|刑部親王]]、[[天武天皇]]の皇子・[[大宝律令]]を編纂--「[[忍壁皇子]]」には「5月8日」と記載--> * [[延久]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1073年]][[6月15日]]） - [[後三条天皇]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Go-Sanjo Go-Sanjō emperor of Japan] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、71代[[天皇]]（* [[1034年]]） * 応永17年（ユリウス暦[[1410年]][[6月9日]]） - [[斯波義将]]、[[室町幕府]][[管領]]（* [[1350年]]） <!--* 慶長7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[6月26日]]） - [[前田玄以]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信忠]]・[[豊臣秀吉]]の家臣（* [[1539年]]）--「[[前田玄以]]」には「5月20日」と記載--> * 元和元年（グレゴリオ暦1615年6月3日） - [[真田信繁]]（幸村）、武将（* [[1567年]]） * [[慶安]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1650年]][[6月5日]]） - [[徳川義直]]、初代[[尾張藩]]主・[[徳川家康]]の九男（* [[1600年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[5月7日 (旧暦)]] to [[May 7 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

== 忌日 == * [[260年]] - [[曹髦]]、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の4代[[皇帝]]（* [[241年]]） <!--* [[慶雲]]2年（ユリウス暦[[705年]][[6月2日]]） - [[忍壁皇子|刑部親王]]、[[天武天皇]]の皇子・[[大宝律令]]を編纂--「[[忍壁皇子]]」には「5月8日」と記載--> * [[延久]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1073年]][[6月15日]]） - [[後三条天皇]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Go-Sanjo Go-Sanjō emperor of Japan] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、71代[[天皇]]（* [[1034年]]） * 応永17年（ユリウス暦[[1410年]][[6月9日]]） - [[斯波義将]]、[[室町幕府]][[管領]]（* [[1350年]]） <!--* 慶長7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[6月26日]]） - [[前田玄以]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信忠]]・[[豊臣秀吉]]の家臣（* [[1539年]]）--「[[前田玄以]]」には「5月20日」と記載--> * 元和元年（グレゴリオ暦1615年6月3日） - [[真田信繁]]（幸村）、武将（* [[1567年]]） * [[慶安]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1650年]][[6月5日]]） - [[徳川義直]]、初代[[尾張藩]]主・[[徳川家康]]の九男（* [[1600年]]）

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|qq=draft}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|qq=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|qq=draft}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|qq=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1582]] {{ill|May 28|ja|5月28日|qq=draft}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|qq=draft}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|qq=draft}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|qq=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 3|ja|6月3日|qq=draft}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|qq=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1703]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|qq=draft}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|Sonezaki Shinchū|ja|曽根崎心中|qq=draft}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|qq=draft}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|qq=draft}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|ja|桜木町駅|qq=draft}}).
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|qq=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|qq=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|qq=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|qq=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|qq=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|qq=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|qq=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|qq=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|qq=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|qq=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|qq=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|qq=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|qq=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|qq=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}

first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|qq=draft}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|ja|桜木町駅|qq=draft}}).
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|qq=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|qq=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|qq=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|qq=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|qq=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|qq=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|qq=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|qq=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|qq=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|qq=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|qq=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|qq=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|qq=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|qq=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|qq=draft}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|qq=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|qq=draft}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|qq=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1582]] {{ill|May 28|ja|5月28日|qq=draft}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|qq=draft}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|qq=draft}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|qq=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 3|ja|6月3日|qq=draft}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|qq=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1703]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|qq=draft}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|Sonezaki Shinchū|ja|曽根崎心中|qq=draft}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|qq=draft}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|qq=draft}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|ja|桜木町駅|qq=draft}}).
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|qq=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|qq=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|qq=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|qq=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|qq=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|qq=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|qq=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|qq=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|qq=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|qq=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|qq=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|qq=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|qq=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|qq=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).

== Births == * [[Ōei]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1402]] {{ill|June 7|ja|6月7日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|ja|一条兼良|qq=draft}}, a waka poet (died [[1481]]). * [[Keichō]] 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1611]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayoshi|ja|保科正之|qq=draft}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|qq=draft}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[1673]]). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|qq=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1730]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|qq=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1801]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|qq=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1857]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Midaiharu|ja|伊東巳代治|qq=draft}}, a politician (died [[1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[260]] – {{ill|Cao Mao|ja|曹髦|qq=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[241]]). * {{ill|Enkyū|ja|延久|qq=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1073]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[1034]]). * {{ill|Ōei|ja|応永|qq=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft}} [[1410]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshimasa|ja|斯波義将|qq=draft}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1350]]). * [[Genna]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|ja|真田信繁|qq=draft}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|qq=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|qq=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yosinobu|ja|徳川義直|qq=draft}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[1600]]).

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkyō|qq=}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genkō|qq=}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 19|qq=}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qq=}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} [[1582]] {{ill|May 28|ja|5月28日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 28|qq=}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|qq=}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genna|qq=}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 3|ja|6月3日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|qq=}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} [[1703]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|qq=}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|Sonezaki Shinchū|ja|曽根崎心中|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonezaki Shinchū|qq=}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu Monzaemon|qq=}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji era|qq=}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} [[1872]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June Station|ja|桜木町駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakuragichō Station|qq=}}).

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]]
{{translated page|ja|5月7日 (旧暦)|version=88264758|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories|
[[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category: Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]
}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:May 7 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 5월 7일]] [[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月初七]]
[[ar:May 7 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]] {{wikidata link|Q839493}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh min nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}

{{translated page|ja|5月7日 (旧暦)|version=88264758|comment=Imported full ja history}}

}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "qid=" to "WD="
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]]
{{translated page|ja|5月7日 (旧暦)|version=88264758|comment=Imported full ja history}}

}}

[[ko:음력 5월 7일]] [[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月初七]]
[[ar:May 7 (Lunisolar)]]

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]] {{wikidata link|Q839493}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}

{{translated page|ja|5月7日 (旧暦)|version=88264758|comment=Imported full ja history}}

}}

== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
