<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初七]]
{{translated page|ja|5月7日 (旧暦)|version=88264758|comment=Imported full ja history}}

}}

[[ko:음력 5월 7일]] [[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月初七]]
[[ar:May 7 (Lunisolar)]]

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}

revision.comment: Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}

== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}

{{translated page|ja|5月7日 (旧暦)|version=88264758|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}

{{translated page|ja|5月7日 (旧暦)|version=88264758|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_yue" to "zh-yue"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初七]][[zh:五月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839493]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] who had turned against the bakufu. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:May 28|May 28]]) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 3|June 3]]) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “[[:en:The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|Sonezaki Shinchū]]” by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] was first performed. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently [[:en:Sakuragichō Station|Sakuragichō Station]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1402|1402]] [[:en:June 7|June 7]]) – [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1481|1481]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 16th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1611|1611]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hoshina Masayuki|Hoshina Masayoshi]], the fourth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] and lord of the Aizu Domain (died [[:en:1673|1673]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]], a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1801|1801]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – [[:en:Itō Miyoji|Itō Midaiharu]], a politician (died [[:en:1934|1934]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:260|260]] – [[:en:Cao Mao|Cao Mao]], the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:241|241]]). * [[:en:Enkyū|Enkyū]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1073|1073]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], the 71st Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1034|1034]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1410|1410]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Shiba Yoshiyuki|Shiba Yoshimasa]], a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1350|1350]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 3) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Yukimura]] (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinao|Tokugawa Yosinobu]], the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born [[:en:1600|1600]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|6|5|8|4|7|6|5|0507}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}

== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=足利尊氏}} who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama 28|WD=Q2588|lt=May 28}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} besieged the Ise province castle, wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615}} {{ill|June 3|en|June 3|WD=Q2623|lt=June 3}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1703|en|1703|WD=Q6822|lt=1703}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|en|The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|WD=Q892262|lt=Sonezaki Shinchū}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|en|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|WD=Q324986|lt=Chikamatsu Monzaemon}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|en|Sakuragichō Station|WD=Q801396|lt=Sakuragichō Station}}).
== Births == * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1402|en|1402|WD=Q6113|lt=1402}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|WD=Q2616|lt=June 7}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|en|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|WD=Q1656375|lt=Ichijō Kaneyoshi}}, a waka poet (died {{ill|1481|en|1481|WD=Q6631|lt=1481}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|WD=Q6768|lt=1611}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayuki|en|Hoshina Masayuki|WD=Q837236|lt=Hoshina Masayoshi}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|WD=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|WD=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|WD=Q2589|lt=May 29}}) – {{ill|Itō Miyoji|en|Itō Miyoji|WD=Q3156022|lt=Itō Midaiharu}}, a politician (died {{ill|1934|en|1934|WD=Q18714|lt=1934}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|260|en|260|WD=Q30311|lt=260}} – {{ill|Cao Mao|en|Cao Mao|WD=Q550290|lt=Cao Mao}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|241|en|241|WD=Q32065|lt=241}}). * {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|WD=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1073|en|1073|WD=Q19437|lt=1073}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|WD=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1034|en|1034|WD=Q19324|lt=1034}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1410|en|1410|WD=Q6151|lt=1410}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshiyuki|en|Shiba Yoshiyuki|WD=Q11500863|lt=Shiba Yoshimasa}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1350|en|1350|WD=Q6094|lt=1350}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|WD=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Yukimura}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|en|Tokugawa Yoshinao|WD=Q1136186|lt=Tokugawa Yosinobu}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|260|en|260|WD=Q30311|lt=260}} – {{ill|Cao Mao|en|Cao Mao|WD=Q550290|lt=Cao Mao}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|241|en|241|WD=Q32065|lt=241}}). * {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|WD=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1073|en|1073|WD=Q19437|lt=1073}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|WD=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1034|en|1034|WD=Q19324|lt=1034}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1410|en|1410|WD=Q6151|lt=1410}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshiyuki|en|Shiba Yoshiyuki|WD=Q11500863|lt=Shiba Yoshimasa}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1350|en|1350|WD=Q6094|lt=1350}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|WD=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Yukimura}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|en|Tokugawa Yoshinao|WD=Q1136186|lt=Tokugawa Yosinobu}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}}).

({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|en|Sakuragichō Station|WD=Q801396|lt=Sakuragichō Station}}).
== Births == * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1402|en|1402|WD=Q6113|lt=1402}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|WD=Q2616|lt=June 7}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|en|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|WD=Q1656375|lt=Ichijō Kaneyoshi}}, a waka poet (died {{ill|1481|en|1481|WD=Q6631|lt=1481}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|WD=Q6768|lt=1611}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayuki|en|Hoshina Masayuki|WD=Q837236|lt=Hoshina Masayoshi}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|WD=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|WD=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|WD=Q2589|lt=May 29}}) – {{ill|Itō Miyoji|en|Itō Miyoji|WD=Q3156022|lt=Itō Midaiharu}}, a politician (died {{ill|1934|en|1934|WD=Q18714|lt=1934}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|260|en|260|WD=Q30311|lt=260}} – {{ill|Cao Mao|en|Cao Mao|WD=Q550290|lt=Cao Mao}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|241|en|241|WD=Q32065|lt=241}}). * {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|WD=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1073|en|1073|WD=Q19437|lt=1073}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|WD=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1034|en|1034|WD=Q19324|lt=1034}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1410|en|1410|WD=Q6151|lt=1410}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshiyuki|en|Shiba Yoshiyuki|WD=Q11500863|lt=Shiba Yoshimasa}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1350|en|1350|WD=Q6094|lt=1350}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|WD=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Yukimura}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|en|Tokugawa Yoshinao|WD=Q1136186|lt=Tokugawa Yosinobu}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}}).

== Births == * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1402|en|1402|WD=Q6113|lt=1402}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|WD=Q2616|lt=June 7}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|en|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|WD=Q1656375|lt=Ichijō Kaneyoshi}}, a waka poet (died {{ill|1481|en|1481|WD=Q6631|lt=1481}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|WD=Q6768|lt=1611}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayuki|en|Hoshina Masayuki|WD=Q837236|lt=Hoshina Masayoshi}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|WD=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|WD=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|WD=Q2589|lt=May 29}}) – {{ill|Itō Miyoji|en|Itō Miyoji|WD=Q3156022|lt=Itō Midaiharu}}, a politician (died {{ill|1934|en|1934|WD=Q18714|lt=1934}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|260|en|260|WD=Q30311|lt=260}} – {{ill|Cao Mao|en|Cao Mao|WD=Q550290|lt=Cao Mao}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|241|en|241|WD=Q32065|lt=241}}). * {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|WD=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1073|en|1073|WD=Q19437|lt=1073}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|WD=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1034|en|1034|WD=Q19324|lt=1034}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1410|en|1410|WD=Q6151|lt=1410}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshiyuki|en|Shiba Yoshiyuki|WD=Q11500863|lt=Shiba Yoshimasa}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1350|en|1350|WD=Q6094|lt=1350}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|WD=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Yukimura}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|en|Tokugawa Yoshinao|WD=Q1136186|lt=Tokugawa Yosinobu}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}}).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.

{{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian == Births == * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1402|en|1402|WD=Q6113|lt=1402|1=1402}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|WD=Q2616|lt=June 7|1=June 7}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|en|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|WD=Q1656375|lt=Ichijō Kaneyoshi|1=Ichijō Kaneyoshi}}, a waka poet (died {{ill|1481|en|1481|WD=Q6631|lt=1481|1=1481}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|WD=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30|1=June 30}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayuki|en|Hoshina Masayuki|WD=Q837236|lt=Hoshina Masayoshi|1=Hoshina Masayuki}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|WD=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada|1=Tokugawa Hidetada}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673|1=1673}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730|1=1730}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21|1=June 21}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|WD=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga|1=Motoori Norinaga}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|WD=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}}) – {{ill|Itō Miyoji|en|Itō Miyoji|WD=Q3156022|lt=Itō Midaiharu|1=Itō Miyoji}}, a politician (died {{ill|1934|en|1934|WD=Q18714|lt=1934|1=1934}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|260|en|260|WD=Q30311|lt=260|1=260}} – {{ill|Cao Mao|en|Cao Mao|WD=Q550290|lt=Cao Mao|1=Cao Mao}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|241|en|241|WD=Q32065|lt=241|1=241}}). * {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|WD=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū|1=Enkyū}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1073|en|1073|WD=Q19437|lt=1073|1=1073}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15|1=June 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|WD=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō|1=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1034|en|1034|WD=Q19324|lt=1034|1=1034}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1410|en|1410|WD=Q6151|lt=1410|1=1410}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9|1=June 9}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshiyuki|en|Shiba Yoshiyuki|WD=Q11500863|lt=Shiba Yoshimasa|1=Shiba Yoshiyuki}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1350|en|1350|WD=Q6094|lt=1350|1=1350}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|WD=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Yukimura|1=Sanada Yukimura}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650|1=1650}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5|1=June 5}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|en|Tokugawa Yoshinao|WD=Q1136186|lt=Tokugawa Yosinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinao}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}}).

{{Not to be confused with|May 7|qq=May 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōryaku}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19|1=June 19}}) – The fall of the 【Rokuhara Tandai|六波羅探題】 in Kyoto occurred due to the attack by the forces of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=足利尊氏|1=Ashikaga Takauji}} who had turned against the bakufu. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} {{ill|May 28|en|May 28|WD=Q2588|lt=May 28|1=May 28}}) – During the campaign against the 【Mōri clan|毛利氏】, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} besieged the Ise province castle, {{ill|Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja|備中高松城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Castle (Binchū)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高松城 (備中国)|1=Takamatsu Castle (Bitchū)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1071073}}, using a naval blockade. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|June 3|en|June 3|WD=Q2623|lt=June 3|1=June 3}}) – During the summer siege of Osaka (【Ōsaka Natsu no Jin】), the Tenshu of Ōsaka Castle burned down. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1703|en|1703|WD=Q6822|lt=1703|1=1703}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20|1=June 20}}) – At Takemotoza in Osaka, the puppet theater play (【Joruri】) “{{ill|The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|en|The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|WD=Q892262|lt=Sonezaki Shinchū|1=The Love Suicides at Sonezaki}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|en|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|WD=Q324986|lt=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12|1=June 12}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|en|Sakuragichō Station|WD=Q801396|lt=Sakuragichō Station|1=Sakuragichō Station}}).
== Births == * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1402|en|1402|WD=Q6113|lt=1402|1=1402}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|WD=Q2616|lt=June 7|1=June 7}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|en|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|WD=Q1656375|lt=Ichijō Kaneyoshi|1=Ichijō Kaneyoshi}}, a waka poet (died {{ill|1481|en|1481|WD=Q6631|lt=1481|1=1481}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|WD=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30|1=June 30}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayuki|en|Hoshina Masayuki|WD=Q837236|lt=Hoshina Masayoshi|1=Hoshina Masayuki}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|WD=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada|1=Tokugawa Hidetada}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673|1=1673}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730|1=1730}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21|1=June 21}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|WD=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga|1=Motoori Norinaga}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|WD=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}}) – {{ill|Itō Miyoji|en|Itō Miyoji|WD=Q3156022|lt=Itō Midaiharu|1=Itō Miyoji}}, a politician (died {{ill|1934|en|1934|WD=Q18714|lt=1934|1=1934}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|260|en|260|WD=Q30311|lt=260|1=260}} – {{ill|Cao Mao|en|Cao Mao|WD=Q550290|lt=Cao Mao|1=Cao Mao}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|241|en|241|WD=Q32065|lt=241|1=241}}). * {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|WD=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū|1=Enkyū}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1073|en|1073|WD=Q19437|lt=1073|1=1073}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15|1=June 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|WD=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō|1=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1034|en|1034|WD=Q19324|lt=1034|1=1034}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1410|en|1410|WD=Q6151|lt=1410|1=1410}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9|1=June 9}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshiyuki|en|Shiba Yoshiyuki|WD=Q11500863|lt=Shiba Yoshimasa|1=Shiba Yoshiyuki}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1350|en|1350|WD=Q6094|lt=1350|1=1350}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|WD=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Yukimura|1=Sanada Yukimura}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650|1=1650}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5|1=June 5}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|en|Tokugawa Yoshinao|WD=Q1136186|lt=Tokugawa Yosinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinao}}, the ninth son of Tokugawa Ieyasu and the first lord of the Owari Domain (born {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}}).
