Sonezaki|en|The Love Suicides at Sonezaki|qid=Q892262|lt=Sonezaki Shinchū|1=The Love Suicides at Sonezaki}}” by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|en|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|qid=Q324986|lt=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon}} was first performed. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|qid=Q2619|lt=June 12|1=June 12}}) – The first railway in Japan began provisional service between Shinagawa Station and Yokohama Station (currently {{ill|Sakuragichō Station|en|Sakuragichō Station|qid=Q801396|lt=Sakuragichō Station|1=Sakuragichō Station}}).
== Births == * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1402|en|1402|qid=Q6113|lt=1402|1=1402}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|qid=Q2616|lt=June 7|1=June 7}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|en|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|qid=Q1656375|lt=Ichijō Kaneyoshi|1=Ichijō Kaneyoshi}}, a waka poet (died {{ill|1481|en|1481|qid=Q6631|lt=1481|1=1481}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|qid=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|qid=Q2657|lt=June 30|1=June 30}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayuki|en|Hoshina Masayuki|qid=Q837236|lt=Hoshina Masayoshi|1=Hoshina Masayuki}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|qid=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada|1=Tokugawa Hidetada}} and lord of the Aizu Domain (died {{ill|1673|en|1673|qid=Q7617|lt=1673|1=1673}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1730|en|1730|qid=Q6957|lt=1730|1=1730}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|qid=Q2671|lt=June 21|1=June 21}}) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|qid=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga|1=Motoori Norinaga}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|qid=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|qid=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}}) – {{ill|Itō Miyoji|en|Itō Miyoji|qid=Q3156022|lt=Itō Midaiharu|1=Itō Miyoji}}, a politician (died {{ill|1934|en|1934|qid=Q18714|lt=1934|1=1934}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|260|en|260|qid=Q30311|lt=260|1=260}} – {{ill|Cao Mao|en|Cao Mao|qid=Q550290|lt=Cao Mao|1=Cao Mao}}, the 4th Emperor of Wei during the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|241|en|241|qid=Q32065|lt=241|1=241}}). * {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|qid=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū|1=Enkyū}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1073|en|1073|qid=Q19437|lt=1073|1=1073}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|qid=Q2613|lt=June 15|1=June 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|qid=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō|1=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1034|en|1034|qid=Q19324|lt=1034|1=1034}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1410|en|1410|qid=Q6151|lt=1410|1=1410}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|qid=Q2618|lt=June 9|1=June 9}}) – {{ill|Shiba Yoshiyuki|en|Shiba Yoshiyuki|qid=Q11500863|lt=Shiba Yoshimasa|1=Shiba Yoshiyuki}}, a military commander and official of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1350|en|1350|qid=Q6094|lt=1350|1=1350}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 3) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|qid=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Yukimura|1=Sanada Yukimura}} (also known as Yukimura, or "Kochi"), a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|qid=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}}
